query: retro vintage faded film photograph melancholy nostalgia
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — retro film fade, nostalgic melancholy palette

response.objective_caption: A woman with long, voluminous curly hair wearing an off-the-shoulder short-sleeved top with a small floral pattern lies back on a cushioned surface with her eyes closed. To her left, three lit candles in decorative curved wrought-iron holders are arranged in a row, and bright light streams in from the upper background behind her head and the cushioned backrest.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman with long, voluminous curly hair wearing an off-the-shoulder short-sleeved top with a small floral pattern lies back on a cushioned surface with her eyes closed, captured in a photograph dominated by a muted, desaturated sepia monotone palette with low vibrancy and retro faded qualities. To her left, three lit candles in decorative wrought-iron holders are arranged in a row, while the bright background light is rendered as an overexposed glow that blows out highlights behind her head and merges with the washed-out tonal treatment, creating a melancholic atmosphere.
